name: ejclaw
description: Personal Claude assistant. Lightweight, secure, customizable.

scripts.install:runners: bun install --frozen-lockfile --cwd runners/shared && bun install --frozen-lockfile --cwd runners/agent-runner && bun install --frozen-lockfile --cwd runners/codex-runner
scripts.build:runners: bun run install:runners && bun run --cwd runners/shared build && bun run --cwd runners/agent-runner build && bun run --cwd runners/codex-runner build
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:runners
scripts.deploy: git pull --ff-only && bun run build:all && systemctl --user restart ejclaw
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run install:runners && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.check.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p runners/shared/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p runners/agent-runner/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p runners/codex-runner/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck:all && bun run test && bun run build:all
